prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular {argument name="warrior culture" default="Mesoamerican"} warrior standing proudly. He wears an elaborate headdress adorned with {argument name="headdress feathers" default="red, green, and black feathers"} and a carved stone mask. His face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. He is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. In his right hand, he grips a {argument name="weapon" default="tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels"}, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. The background features a towering {argument name="background structure" default="ancient stepped stone pyramid"} with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. Lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with {argument name="lighting style" default="epic cinematic lighting"}.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真、高度精细的肖像，描绘了一位肌肉发达的 {argument name="warrior culture" default="中美洲"} 战士自豪地站立着。他戴着装饰有 {argument name="headdress feathers" default="红色、绿色和黑色羽毛"} 的精致头饰以及雕刻的石面具。他的脸颊和鼻梁上有深色的彩绘线条。他身着厚重且复杂的礼仪盔甲，包括一条带有面部吊坠的大型石项链、臂环，以及一条带有雕刻符号和人脸图案的缠腰布的精致腰带。他的右手紧握着一把 {argument name="weapon" default="带有石制尖端和红色流苏的高大木矛"}，左手拿着一面圆盾，盾牌上展示着一张巨大的雕刻人脸，边缘带有红色流苏。背景是一座高耸的 {argument name="background structure" default="古代阶梯式石金字塔"}，有着陡峭的台阶，顶部入口附近悬挂着旗帜，台阶上站着一些小人影。郁郁葱葱的丛林植被环绕着神庙，天空半多云，右侧前景中矗立着一块高大的雕刻石碑，所有画面均以 {argument name="lighting style" default="史诗般的电影级灯光"} 呈现。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影级中美洲战士肖像：生成一张高度精细、照片级逼真的肖像，描绘了一位身着礼仪盔甲的古代战士站在高耸的阶梯金字塔前。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
